tests.name: init_sh_non_interactive_exits_zero
tests.details: init.sh --non-interactive exit code 0; PR #19 BL-016 working as primary driver

tests.name: context7_detection
tests.details: verify-install.sh reports Context7 MCP installed and configured

tests.name: framework_self_guard_active
tests.details: Run from $FRAMEWORK exits 1 with 'Refusing to operate inside the Solo Orchestrator framework repo' message (PR #18 verified)

documentation_gaps.gap: process-checklist.sh --help omits --start-phase1 (it exists in dispatcher but is not listed in the help text)

tests.name: each_phase1_step_completes
tests.details: All 5 PHASE1_STEPS (architecture_selected, threat_model_complete, data_model_defined, ui_scaffolding_done, bible_synthesized) completed sequentially with stub artifacts

tests.name: phase_state_advances_to_2
tests.details: U-D regression: no script auto-advances .current_phase from 1 to 2 after gate passes. Manually set jq .current_phase=2 to continue testing. This confirms still-open prior-sweep bug U-D.

framework_bugs.summary: U-D confirmation: no script advances current_phase after phase 1 gate passes
framework_bugs.reproduction: Complete all PHASE1_STEPS via process-checklist.sh; run check-phase-gate.sh; observe .claude/phase-state.json .current_phase remains 0 (or unchanged)
framework_bugs.expected: After phase 1 gate passes and approval logged, current_phase should advance to 2
framework_bugs.actual: current_phase unchanged; no automation in scripts/ updates this field; manual jq edit required to proceed

documentation_gaps.gap: No documented procedure to advance .current_phase after a gate passes

tests.name: each_step_completes_in_order
tests.details: All 5 build_loop steps (tests_written, tests_verified_failing, implemented, security_audit, documentation_updated) completed sequentially

tests.name: pre_commit_passes_after_loop
tests.details: git commit succeeded after all 5 steps; commit hash b7713ac

tests.name: bl006_blocks_feat_without_loop
tests.details: U-C confirmation: direct shell `git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop'` succeeded (commit 0d1748e). check-commit-message correctly returns exit 1 with proper guidance, but the actual git commit operation bypasses the gate when invoked directly from shell (only the PreToolUse path enforces). Still-open prior-sweep bug U-C.

tests.name: bl006_grace_window_resets_after_record
tests.details: After --record-feature uat-feat-1 + completing build_loop:feature_recorded, started uat-feat-2 loop, completed all 5 steps, then check-commit-message 'feat(uat-feat-2): grace window test' returned exit 0 (PR #17 BL-006 grace window verified)

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_blocks_commit
tests.details: Wrote .claude/pending-approval.json with valid schema; piped {"tool_name":"Bash","tool_input":{"command":"git commit -m 'chore: foo'"}} to pre-commit-gate.sh; output is permissionDecision=deny with sentinel question content

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_resolves
tests.details: scripts/pending-approval.sh --clear removed sentinel; subsequent commit attempt no longer blocked by sentinel (now blocked by Phase 2 init verification, an unrelated workflow gate)

framework_bugs.summary: U-C confirmation: direct shell git commit bypasses BL-006 enforcement
framework_bugs.reproduction: After init.sh, jq .current_phase=2; do not run process-checklist.sh --start-feature; run `git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(x): foo'` directly
framework_bugs.expected: Commit blocked because no Build Loop is active and no feat: scaffolding ran the PreToolUse gate
framework_bugs.actual: Commit succeeds; only the agent-mediated PreToolUse path enforces. Reconfirms still-open U-C from prior sweep — only fixable via git commit-msg hook installation, which init.sh does not do.

tests.name: start_phase3_exits_zero
tests.details: rc=0; phase3_validation initialized; warning about 1 feature since last UAT session noted

tests.name: uat_template_lints_clean
tests.details: lint-uat-scenarios.sh correctly identifies placeholders in unpopulated tests/uat/templates/test-session-template.html (rc=1, 21 violations); reference file reports 'No scenarios block' (rc=2). Linter is functioning.

tests.name: each_uat_step_completes
tests.details: All 9 UAT_STEPS (agents_dispatched..gate_passed) completed sequentially with stub artifacts

tests.name: phase3_to_phase4_gate
tests.details: check-phase-gate.sh reports 9 phase 3 steps complete; warns missing review-manifest.json (acceptable for stubbed UAT)

documentation_gaps.gap: lint-uat-scenarios.sh requires explicit file argument; no convention documented for which uat scenario template to lint per project. The runbook says to 'run scripts/lint-uat-scenarios.sh against generated UAT scenario' but no such generated file path is canonical.

tests.name: each_phase4_step_completes
tests.details: All 6 PHASE4_STEPS (production_build, rollback_tested, go_live_verified, monitoring_configured, handoff_written, handoff_tested) completed with stub artifacts (HANDOFF.md, RELEASE_NOTES.md, rollback-test, handoff-test)

tests.name: handoff_md_required
tests.details: phase4_release:handoff_written artifact check requires HANDOFF.md and was enforced

tests.name: release_notes_required
tests.details: phase4_release:go_live_verified artifact check requires RELEASE_NOTES.md and was enforced

tests.name: phase4_completion_state
tests.details: .current_phase=4 after manual advancement; all 6 phase4_release steps complete

tests.name: no_uncommitted_secrets
tests.details: grep matches in committed files are all framework/CI references (e.g. GITHUB_TOKEN secret reference, gitleaks comments, doc text), not actual leaked credentials

tests.name: log_files_consistent
tests.details: N/A - .claude/process-audit.log absent (no FORCE/reset events occurred); appropriate for this run

tests.name: no_framework_contamination
tests.details: git -C $FRAMEWORK status --short shows only pre-existing untracked dirs (.claude/, Reports/uat-2026-04-26/); HEAD unchanged at d66e8f276079aa352ba90ac54386e1b1896d7494

summary: All Section A-E and G assertions pass for base/personal/desktop/full config. Confirmed PR #17/18/19 fixes (init.sh --non-interactive, BL-006 grace window, BL-015 sentinel, framework-self guard, U-H helper copy). Re-confirmed two still-open prior-sweep bugs at Medium severity: U-D (no auto-advance of current_phase after gate) and U-C (direct shell git commit bypasses BL-006). No new Critical or High regressions.
